title: 不審者だけど、あんし～ん！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm tidying up after training one day, I happen
to spot a suspicious figure lurking about...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'd say that she needs a single poke there.
As for her... maybe ten pokes would do...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oops, you caught me! ☆ But no worries! I haven't
laid a needle on anyone yet.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I just came here to conduct visualization training
for my treatments. I have only the best wishes for
Umamusume-kind's bright future! ☆
choice_data_list: I'm just going to call the cops real quick...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, stop! Let's not get hasty! Put down the
phone for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me that you don't care if the
(self-proclaimed) crown jewel of the acupuncture
world, Sasami Anshinzawa, is gone forever?!
choice_data_list: The safety of my trainee comes first.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But you must trust me when I say this—I have
always wished for Umamusume to succeed and
flourish! From the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: See? We're two peas in a pod.
choice_data_list: I'd love to believe you, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just look at the reviews on our
homepage! "Thanks to acupuncture, I finally got
first place!" "Ever since I got treated, every day
has been sunshine and rainbows!"

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See? Nothing but five-star reviews! ☆ They're all
for my master, but still!
choice_data_list: Fine, but no more trespassing, all right?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, you're really letting me go scot-free?! So you can be reasoned with after all! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! Let me give you a free treatment
session as thanks! It'll be a great chance for you
to become mighty and strong!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If it goes well, that is... But I'm sure it will! See, no
worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I refuse her offer, but I was able to learn a bit
more about acupuncture through this experience.
